gates.label: Trigger Lab
gates.review_action: Add model-executed route evidence plus blind and adversarial holdout before claiming library-grade routing.

gates.label: Output Lab
gates.review_action: Add file-backed fixtures, baseline vs with-skill runs, and blind A/B review pack.

gates.label: Runtime Matrix
gates.review_action: Generate packaged adapters and conformance matrix before external distribution.

gates.label: Trust Report
gates.review_action: Pin dependencies and convert invoice CLIs to argparse for a cleaner trust surface.

gates.label: Runtime Permission Probes
gates.review_action: Run packaged adapter permission probes after a dist package exists.

gates.label: Skill Atlas
gates.review_action: Generate a full atlas of route collisions, stale skills, and no-route opportunities before library release.

gates.label: Operations Loop
gates.review_action: Add adoption drift reporting only after team usage data exists; do not fabricate telemetry.

gates.label: Registry Audit
gates.review_action: Add registry/package/install simulation evidence before publishing outside the repository.
